info.name: School Health Backend - Full API
info.description:
Collection bao gom day du endpoint hien co trong backend Spring Boot (91 requests, 13 modules).

HUONG DAN IMPORT:
1. Postman > Import > SchoolHealth_Backend.postman_collection.json (Replace neu da co)
2. Import environment: backend/postman/SchoolHealth_Backend.postman_environment.json
3. Chon environment 'School Health Backend - Full API (Local)'
4. Khoi dong backend Spring Boot + MySQL
5. Collection Runner — chay theo thu tu folder

THU TU CHAY:
Auth > Users > Parents (parentId) > Students (studentId) > Nurses (nurseId, reportedById) > ...

SCRIPT TESTS:
- Moi request co script UTC-* san
- POST tao moi tu dong luu ID vao environment
- HTTP 200: user/parent/student/nurse/manager/doc/profile
- HTTP 201: blog/supply/incident/checkup/vaccination
